name: claude-code-via-cursor
description: Personal fork of Claude Code Chat with the OpenCredits integration removed. Routes only to your local Claude Code.
author: Keldon Rush (appcloud9.com)

ccvc.wsl.enabled.description: Enable WSL integration for running Claude

ccvc.wsl.nodePath.description: Optional path to Node.js in the WSL distribution. Only needed if Claude was installed via npm. Recent Claude installs ship as a native executable and don't require Node.

ccvc.wsl.claudePath.description: Path to Claude executable in the WSL distribution

ccvc.thinking.show.description: Default for whether Claude's summarized thoughts are shown (the Thoughts toggle in the prompt pane). Per-session changes from the toggle take precedence.

ccvc.thinking.effort.description: Default thinking effort/depth (e.g. low, medium, high, xhigh, max). Empty inherits the model's default. Per-session changes from the Effort picker take precedence; available levels are per-model.

ccvc.permissions.yoloMode.description: Enable Yolo Mode to skip all permission checks. Use with caution as Claude can execute any command without asking.

ccvc.executable.path.description: Custom path to the Claude Code executable. Leave empty to use the default 'claude' command.

ccvc.environment.variables.description: Custom environment variables to pass to Claude Code. Example: {"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": "sk-..."}

ccvc.environment.disabled.description: When enabled, custom environment variables are not passed to Claude Code.

ccvc.terminal.useIntegrated.description: Use Cursor's integrated terminal for slash commands. Uncheck to use an external terminal.

ccvc.terminal.externalApp.description: External terminal application name (e.g., iTerm2, Windows Terminal, kitty).

ccvc.terminal.customTemplate.description: Custom terminal launch template. Use {{command}} as placeholder for the command to run.

ccvc.terminal.borderColor.description: Border color for the prompt in terminal mode.

ccvc.terminal.fontColor.description: Font color for the prompt in terminal mode.

ccvc.modes.items.description: Items shown in the prompt mode picker. Each item sends its `command` as an explicit message when clicked. Built-in ids 'agent' and 'plan' get matching icons; other ids get a generic icon.

id.description: Stable id; 'agent'/'plan' drive the status pill and get built-in icons.

label.description: Text shown in the menu and (for the active mode) on the pill.

command.description: The message sent when this item is clicked, e.g. '/modes plan ./doc'.

ccvc.firstRun.hasShown.description: Whether the first-run experience has been shown. Uncheck to see it again on next launch.

ccvc.migratedFromClaudeCodeChat.description: Internal: set once the one-time migration of legacy claudeCodeChat.* settings to ccvc.* has run. Not meant to be edited manually.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:downloader: npm run compile && mocha --ui tdd "out/test/downloader*.test.js" --reporter spec --timeout 360000
scripts.test:downloader:unit: npm run compile && mocha --ui tdd out/test/downloader.test.js --reporter spec
